page_group.source_span_summary: 填写当前 group 覆盖的剧情跨度
page_group.rhythm_rationale: 填写为什么这一组适合压成当前 9 pages。

continuity_context.same_visual_dna_rule: Reuse the same rendering medium, line system, shadow method, lettering feeling, and character age ratio across all groups.

hard_constraints: Each output image is one complete vertical 9:16 comic page.
Do not create a nine-grid collage, contact sheet, or one image containing all pages.
Do not create nine variations of the same scene.
Every page must contain multiple comic panels, never a single full-page illustration.
Keep the nine pages as a continuous story sequence.
Keep character and scene consistency across all pages.
Place a small page number in the bottom-right corner of every page, using digits 1-9 only.

knowledge_refs: .agents/skills/comic/2-九刀流漫画提示词/types/漫画/少年战斗冒险/少年战斗冒险.md
.agents/skills/comic/2-九刀流漫画提示词/types/漫画/少年战斗冒险/命名体系.md
knowledge_digest: 名字、誓言、禁忌和宿命必须带压强。
control_surface_digest: control_surface.conflict_engine.premise: 主角在更大的规则世界里被迫升级、立誓、结盟、翻盘。
control_surface.page_turn_mechanism.turn_trigger: 招式命名、宿敌惊讶、代价上身

conflict_engine.premise: 主角在更大的规则世界里被迫升级、立誓、结盟、翻盘。

role_matrix.protagonist: 主动求胜且短板可见的成长者

page_turn_mechanism.turn_trigger: 招式命名、宿敌惊讶、代价上身

failure_modes: 设定说明压过动作因果

projection_summary.nine_blade_prompting: 优先 splash、diagonal、绝对化对白和高势能命名。

main_character_lock.name: 角色名
main_character_lock.anchor_prompt: Character locked across all panels: 角色名, [species or identity], [body type and silhouette], [face signature], [costume], [material and color palette], consistent face, costume, silhouette and color palette in every panel and every page.

scene_continuity_bible.default_rule: Keep recurring locations consistent in architecture, landmark props, lighting mood, and spatial geography across all relevant pages.

scene_locks.name: 雷云山门
scene_locks.anchor_prompt: Scene locked across relevant pages: 雷云山门, ancient black stone gate carved with thunder totems, cracked steps, drifting ash, storm-dark sky, cold blue lightning highlights, consistent architecture, landmark props, lighting mood and spatial geography across every relevant page.

scene_locks.name: 祭火大殿
scene_locks.anchor_prompt: Scene locked across relevant pages: 祭火大殿, towering bronze pillars, ritual fire basin at center, red-gold glow, smoke haze, long stone aisle, consistent architecture, landmark props, lighting mood and spatial geography across every relevant page.

style_bible.base_style: cinematic comic realism with sharp classic manga page grammar
style_bible.layout_directive: Use classic manga page grammar: splash panels, inset reaction panels, diagonal cuts, border-breaking SFX, silent beat panels, close-up strips, and irregular gutters. Avoid nine pages of flat top-to-bottom strips.
style_bible.rendering: dramatic rim lighting, hyper detailed textures, bold black panel borders, clear gutters, printed comic page feeling
style_bible.color_script: high contrast cinematic palette matched to story mood

character_locks.name: 反派名
character_locks.anchor_prompt: Character locked across all relevant pages: 反派名, gaunt body, scar across the left cheek, narrow eyes, dark ceremonial armor with bronze trim, stable face, stable costume, stable silhouette, clearly distinguishable from the protagonist.

character_locks.name: 同伴名
character_locks.anchor_prompt: Character locked across all relevant pages: 同伴名, slim build, white short cloak, braided hair, jade hairpin, stable face, stable costume, stable silhouette, clearly distinguishable from the protagonist and antagonist.

dialogue.visual_form: speech bubble containing clear legible Chinese text
dialogue.placement_rule: near the speaking character, inside the panel, not at the far edge
dialogue.legibility_rule: clear legible Chinese text, short sentence, do not cover faces

narration.visual_form: rectangular caption box containing clear legible Chinese text
narration.placement_rule: panel edge or gutter edge caption, readable and not blocking key acting
narration.legibility_rule: clear legible Chinese text for narration compression

inner_monologue.visual_form: thought bubble or inner monologue caption containing clear legible Chinese text
inner_monologue.placement_rule: near the thinker or as an inner caption inside the panel, clearly different from dialogue
inner_monologue.legibility_rule: clear legible Chinese text, emotionally concise

sfx.visual_form: large hand-lettered comic SFX text integrated inside the panel
sfx.placement_rule: integrated with the action source inside the panel, never floating like a sticker
sfx.legibility_rule: clear legible Chinese onomatopoeia as part of the drawing
